Class InterceptingEventManager

java.lang.Object
dev.chojo.aether.common.eventmanager.InterceptingEventManager
All Implemented Interfaces:

    • exception

      public <V extends Throwable> void exception(Class<V> err, ExceptionHandler handler)
      Register an exception handler. Exception handlers are called in the order they were registered.
      Type Parameters:
      V - exception type to handle
      Parameters:
      err - error class to handle
      handler - handler to call when the error is thrown
